description: DOCUMENT is a shared resource requiring coordinated write access
EDITOR cannot begin review until both writers (WRITER_A and WRITER_B) have finished writing and updating references
Either writer may need to edit the other's chapter for cross-chapter consistency (WRITER_A and WRITER_B)
EDITOR finds inconsistencies and requests revisions, or accepts chapters
WRITER_A and WRITER_B complete their chapters before EDITOR review; revision loop if inconsistencies found
WRITER_A, WRITER_B, and EDITOR may need DOCUMENT; writers may cross-edit creating contention
